prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A three-layer cake viewed in cross-section. Bottom layer (blue, labeled "models/"): contains type definition cards and interface documents, forming the foundation. Middle layer (green, labeled "services/"): contains business logic gears and processing units that reference the models below via downward arrows. Top layer (orange, labeled "main.ts"): the entry point with a "start" button that orchestrates the services. Arrows flow strictly downward showing dependency direction. A side legend shows "imports flow down, never up". The cake sits on a plate labeled "src/".
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
